subject: Fermi GBM trigger 482632364/160418023 is not a GRB
body:
E. Bissaldi (Politecnico & INFN Bari) and E. Burns (UAH)
report on behalf of the Fermi GBM Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 482632364/160418023
at 00:32:40.26 UT on 18 April 2016, tentatively classified as a GRB,
is in fact not due to a GRB.

This trigger is due to solar activity."
